description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stylized, spiky hairstyle and a distinctive mask covering the face, giving a mysterious or urban fantasy appearance. He is dressed in a casual, sporty outfit consisting of a zip-up jacket with gradient blue sleeves, a visible undershirt, and cropped jogger-style pants. The figure's footwear consists of open-toe flip-flops, and there are visible tattoo-like markings on the lower legs. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the overall build is athletic. The clothing fits loosely, suggesting comfort and ease of movement, suitable for an urban or street environment.
description: A masked adult male in a sporty jacket, jogger pants, and flip-flops, with spiky hair and visible leg markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the masked face, spiky hair, zip-up jacket, undershirt, and relaxed stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue sleeve gradient, profile of the mask, and leg markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, hair, and both arms at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the sleeve gradient and leg markings.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket, undershirt, cropped jogger pants
